name: Jeff Foxworthy
blurb: His 1993 album You Might Be a Redneck If...
bio: Jeff Foxworthy is an American stand-up comedian best known for his You Might Be a Redneck one-liners and his observational comedy about Southern and working-class life. His 1993 album You Might Be a Redneck If... topped the comedy charts and went multi-platinum, and he became a centerpiece of the Blue Collar Comedy Tour, making him one of the best-selling comedy recording artists of all time.

timeline.ev: Won Great Southeastern Laugh-off at Atlanta's Punchline club
Album You Might Be a Redneck If... released
Released album You Might Be a Redneck If…, topped comedy chart
Stars in The Jeff Foxworthy Show sitcom
Starred in sitcom The Jeff Foxworthy Show on ABC
Co-founds the Blue Collar Comedy Tour
Co-launched the Blue Collar Comedy Tour film and franchise
Began hosting Are You Smarter than a 5th Grader? on Fox

accolades: First album certified multi-platinum by the RIAA
First two albums each certified 3x Platinum by the RIAA
Multiple Grammy nominations for Best Comedy/Spoken Comedy Album (1996, 1999, 2001)
Won American Comedy Award for Funniest Male Stand-Up Comic (1990)
